text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho finally arrives. In the
lead-up to the big race, the waiting room is
completely silent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the culmination of months of hard work.
Manhattan Cafe's raw power will be put to the
test.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This might be the race where she reaches her
friend. Manhattan Cafe heads for the race with a
smile that suggests she's confident it'll happen.
